name: Faster Pussycat
description:
'''Faster Pussycat''' is an American [[hard rock]]/[[glam metal]] band from Los Angeles, formed in 1985 by vocalist [[Taime Downe]], guitarists Greg Steele and [[Brent Muscat]] and bassist [[Kelly Nickels]]. The group has since gone through numerous lineup changes leaving Downe as the only constant member. They broke up in 1993, but reformed in 2001. Faster Pussycat has released four studio albums to date: ''[[Faster Pussycat (album)|Faster Pussycat]]'' (1987), ''[[Wake Me When It's Over]]'' (1989), ''[[Whipped!]]'' (1992) and ''[[The Power and the Glory Hole]]'' (2006). They were a successful [[hard rock]] band during the late 1980s and early 1990s, having sold over two million records worldwide.

In 2020, Jeff Mezydlo of ''[[Yardbarker]]'' included them in his list of "the 20 greatest hair metal bands of all time".
